prompt: 为以下三个任务选择正确的隔离级别: 1) 修复 typo（无代码变更）; 2) 添加新功能（新分支）; 3) 大型重构（需要 worktree）

assertions.name: selects_none_for_trivial
assertions.description: Should select no isolation for trivial typo fixes
assertions.check: output.includes('none') || output.includes('无隔离') || output.includes('直接') || output.includes('trivial')

assertions.name: selects_branch_for_feature
assertions.description: Should select branch isolation for new features

assertions.name: selects_worktree_for_refactor
assertions.description: Should select worktree isolation for large refactors
